app.title: EffexorWinPE — Diagnostics
app.subtitle: Standalone diagnostics and recovery environment
app.read_only_banner: Read-only mode. Mutating operations are unavailable.
msg.no_report: No report loaded yet. Start diagnostics or enable mock mode.
msg.report_corrupt: The report is corrupt or is not valid JSON
msg.schema_unsupported: The report schema version is not supported
msg.process_hung: The process did not respond in time and was stopped
msg.process_failed: The process exited with an error. See the journal for details.
msg.export_readonly: The folder is read-only or not writable
msg.export_usb_failed: Export to USB is not possible
msg.cmd_failed: Could not open the command prompt
msg.mock_mode: Mock mode: using embedded demonstration data
msg.see_journal: Full technical text is available in the journal

msg.diagnosis_corrupt: Diagnosis file is corrupt or invalid
msg.session_corrupt: Session file is corrupt or invalid
msg.kiosk_hint: Fullscreen mode. Esc switches to windowed mode.
diag.headline.info: Preflight found no obvious fault in the available evidence
diag.headline.critical: Preflight found evidence that requires immediate technician attention
diag.headline.warning: Preflight found issues that require additional diagnosis
diag.headline.unknown: Preflight is limited by missing diagnostic evidence
No obvious fault was identified in the collected evidence
The current report contains no rule-matched fault, but it does not include every diagnostic source and is not a clean bill of health.
diag.finding.evidence.sources-incomplete: Collector check(s) reported unknown or error status; conclusions that depend on those sources must stay provisional.
diag.finding.windows.installation-not-fo: No offline Windows installation was detected
Windows may be on an unmounted, encrypted, unsupported, or damaged volume, or the required storage driver may be missing.
diag.finding.windows.multiple-installati: Repair planning must identify the intended system before any offline operation.
diag.finding.boot.bcd-not-visible.title: BCD store is not visible
diag.finding.boot.bcd-not-visible.ration: The expected BCD store for the current firmware mode was not discovered.
Firmware mode and discovered BCD stores are inconsistent.
diag.finding.storage.disk.health.title: Disk reports a health problem
diag.finding.storage.disk.health.rationa: Disk health status is not Healthy/OK.
diag.finding.storage.drive.health.title: Drive reliability counters indicate risk
diag.finding.storage.drive.health.ration: Drive health status is not normal.
diag.finding.storage.drive.temperature.r: Drive temperature is above the expected range.
diag.finding.storage.drive.wear.title: High drive wear
diag.finding.storage.drive.wear.rational: SSD/NVMe wear counter indicates significant wear.
diag.finding.storage.drive.errors.title: Drive read/write errors
diag.finding.storage.drive.errors.ration: Read or write error counters are non-zero.
diag.finding.bitlocker.locked-volumes.ra: One or more BitLocker volumes are locked.
diag.step.review-missing-sources.title: Review unavailable diagnostic providers
diag.step.review-missing-sources.rationa: Decide whether a storage driver, WinPE optional component, or vendor utility is required before diagnosis.
diag.step.identify-windows-volume.title: Identify the Windows volume
diag.step.identify-windows-volume.ration: Correlate visible disks, partitions, encryption state, and storage-driver availability.
diag.step.select-windows-target.title: Select the Windows target
diag.step.select-windows-target.rational: Confirm which installation should be diagnosed.
diag.step.inspect-bcd.title: Inspect BCD stores
diag.step.inspect-bcd.rationale: Correlate BCD paths with firmware mode.
diag.step.correlate-boot-targets.title: Correlate boot targets
diag.step.correlate-boot-targets.rationa: Relate BCD entries, Windows installs, and visible volumes.
diag.step.review-bitlocker-access.title: Review BitLocker access
diag.step.review-bitlocker-access.ration: Confirm the technician has authorized access to recovery keys.
diag.step.verify-storage-health.title: Verify storage health
diag.step.export.report.title: Export diagnostic report
diag.step.export.report.rationale: Preserve collector and diagnosis JSON for the technician
diag.question.system-drive-visible-in-fi: Is the expected system drive visible in BIOS/UEFI setup or another operating system?
diag.question.intended-windows-installat: Which Windows installation is the intended target?
diag.question.authorized-bitlocker-acces: Is authorized BitLocker key access available?
msg.stale_artifact: Stale artifacts from a previous run were detected
msg.export_fixed_confirm: This is an internal fixed disk. Exporting here may affect client data. Continue?
msg.export_no_removable: No removable drives found. Show fixed drives (confirmation required)?
diag.limitation.offline_conservative: Offline preflight uses conservative deterministic rules; it is not the model-backed EffexorWinPE agent diagnosis.
diag.limitation.missing_providers: Missing providers or counters reduce confidence and never imply that hardware is healthy.
diag.limitation.read_only_steps: This assessment contains read-only next steps only and cannot execute repair commands.
diag.limitation.no_gateway: Offline preflight does not contact the model gateway
diag.limitation.smart_null: SMART counters may be null in WinPE
